name: test/postinstall-trigger
description: Fires composer scripts via a real (local) require. Declares post-install-cmd, post-update-cmd, AND post-autoload-dump pointing at the same marker because `composer install` with no composer.lock present transparently routes through `update` ('No composer.lock file present. Updating dependencies to latest…'), which fires post-update-cmd + post-autoload-dump but NOT post-install-cmd. A fixture declaring only post-install-cmd would never fire in that code path — a tautology that passes whether hardening works or not. Declaring all three guarantees the script fires regardless of which composer code path runs.
